top_stories.title: Why Wall Street wasn’t won over by Nvidia’s big conference
top_stories.description: Despite investor fears of an AI bubble, Nvidia's latest conference shows that most in the industry aren't concerned by that possibility.
top_stories.author: Rebecca Szkutak
top_stories.content: Despite investor fears of an AI bubble, Nvidia's latest conference shows that most in the industry aren't concerned by that possibility.

top_stories.title: What happened at Nvidia GTC: NemoClaw, Robot Olaf, and a $1 trillion bet
top_stories.description: CEO Jensen Huang took the stage at Nvidia’s GTC conference this week in his signature leather jacket to deliver a two-and-a-half-hour keynote, projecting $1 trillion in AI chip sales through 2027, declaring that every company needs an “OpenClaw strategy,” and closing with a rambling Olaf robot that had to get its mic cut. The message was hard to miss: Nvidia […]
top_stories.author: Theresa Loconsolo
top_stories.content: CEO Jensen Huang took the stage at Nvidia’s GTC conference this week in his signature leather jacket to deliver a two-and-a-half-hour keynote, projecting $1 trillion in AI chip sales through 2027, declaring that every company needs an “OpenClaw strategy,” and closing with a rambling Olaf robot that had to get its mic cut. The message was hard to miss: Nvidia […]

top_stories.title: Run NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super on Amazon Bedrock
top_stories.description: This post explores the technical characteristics of the Nemotron 3 Super model and discusses potential application use cases. It also provides technical guidance to get started using this model for your generative AI applications within the Amazon Bedrock environment.
top_stories.author: Aris Tsakpinis
top_stories.content: This post explores the technical characteristics of the Nemotron 3 Super model and discusses potential application use cases. It also provides technical guidance to get started using this model for your generative AI applications within the Amazon Bedrock environment.

top_stories.title: NVIDIA, Telecom Leaders Build AI Grids to Optimize Inference on Distributed Networks
top_stories.description: As AI‑native applications scale to more users, agents and devices, the telecommunications network is becoming the next frontier for distributing AI. At NVIDIA GTC 2026, leading operators in the U.S. and Asia showed that this shift is underway, announcing AI grids — geographically distributed and interconnected AI infrastructure — using their network footprint to power […]
top_stories.author: Kanika Atri
top_stories.content: As AI‑native applications scale to more users, agents and devices, the telecommunications network is becoming the next frontier for distributing AI. At NVIDIA GTC 2026, leading operators in the U.S. and Asia showed that this shift is underway, announcing AI grids — geographically distributed and interconnected AI infrastructure — using their network footprint to power […]

top_stories.title: How Bark.com and AWS collaborated to build a scalable video generation solution
top_stories.description: Working with the AWS Generative AI Innovation Center, Bark developed an AI-powered content generation solution that demonstrated a substantial reduction in production time in experimental trials while improving content quality scores. In this post, we walk you through the technical architecture we built, the key design decisions that contributed to success, and the measurable results achieved, giving you a blueprint for implementing similar solutions.
top_stories.author: Zainab Afolabi
top_stories.content: Working with the AWS Generative AI Innovation Center, Bark developed an AI-powered content generation solution that demonstrated a substantial reduction in production time in experimental trials while improving content quality scores. In this post, we walk you through the technical architecture we built, the key design decisions that contributed to success, and the measurable results achieved, giving you a blueprint for implementing similar solutions.
